inline_comments.message: This is not valid data-format.. not sure how is this json is utilized by PMSH, should this be submitted under policy project?

The original thought was to add a sample operational policy json file in dpo folder to assist operators as a reference on what operational policy look like, would perhaps putting this file in dpo directory instead of data-formats would suit?

I believe Policy project may have place-holder to maintain such sample operational policy config - looped Jim/Pam for guidance.
Once added there, we could update PMSH documentation to reference that config and provide steps for onboarding that policy

Thanks Vijay, I discussed with Fiachra and Liam for putting the operational policy in the policy repo: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=policy/models.git;a=tree;f=models-examples/src/main/resources/policies;hb=5a94ebda407e82a8df4abea1b8a916ea4f88d9cd, I'll abandon this commit since we don't need to put it on PMSH anymore. Once we reviewed the format of the policy I'll create a commit on the policy repo
